title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: Kernel orchestration is active for this session. Bootstrap target: 6+ lanes (minimum 6). Active models: Codex, GLM, Copilot fallback. Lane manifest: - `Locke`: architecture reviewer - contract-vs-runtime remediation priorities - `Schrodinger`: ops reviewer - progress receipts, failover, and observability gaps - `James`: QC-gates reviewer - runtime enforcement gaps for readability and take-home rules - `Newton`: workflow reviewer - minimal `selected_variant` finalization design - `glm-bridge`: external reviewer - independent remediation priority check - `claude-bridge-fallback`: external reviewer - Claude lane fallback via Copilot for independent critique Kernel consensus after startup is this: 1. The highest-priority flaw is `adaptive PASS` not meeting the same artifact rigor as native. Evidence: `host-rendered preview` is documented as mandatory, but Google Slides fallback can pass with URL/ID only. References: [SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L86) [SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L91) [agent.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/agents/agent.md#L22) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L344) [delivery-gate.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-prod-verify-skill-update/live-delivery/variants/nanobanana-adaptive/delivery-gate.json#L4) 2. The second flaw is observability drift. `progress.json` is supposed to expose terminal states, but successful runs still leave it at `running/polling`. References: [SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L94) [progress.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-prod-verify-skill-update/live-delivery/variants/nanobanana-adaptive/progress.json#L4) 3. The third flaw is that your new readability rules are still mostly contract-level, not machine-enforced. `take-home`, acronym expansion, font floors, readable source panels, and orange-line suppression are documented upstream, but QC/runtime enforcement is still partial. References: [SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L63) [SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L71) [SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/SKILL.md#L61) [verify-quality.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/agents/verify-quality.md#L55) 4. The fourth flaw is that the system still lacks a true finish step. The matrix is intentionally left at `selected_variant: null`; user choice exists, but canonical promotion is not yet part of the runtime. References: [variant-matrix.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-prod-verify-skill-update/live-delivery/variant-matrix.json#L4) If the goal is to harden the system next, the order should be: 1. Make adaptive delivery contract parity real. 2. Fix `progress.json` terminal-state correctness. 3. Turn readability/take-home/acronym rules into blocking QC, not just `SKILL.md`. 4. Add `selected_variant -> canonical output` finalization. fallback_used: true missing_lane: Claude fallback_provider: copilot-cli fallback_reason: `You've hit your limit · resets Mar 20 at 9pm (Asia/Tokyo)`
